2606.06453.title: Vortex: Efficient and Programmable Sparse Attention Serving for AI Agents
2606.06453.paper_summary: Sparse attention is becoming increasingly important for serving large language models (LLMs) as generation lengths continue to grow. However, deploying and evaluating new sparse attention algorithms at scale remains highly engineering-intensive, slowing both human researchers and AI agents in exploring the sparse attention design. To address this challenge, we present Vortex, a system that combines a Python-embedded frontend language atop a page-centric tensor abstraction for expressing a broad range of sparse attention algorithms, with an efficient backend tightly integrated into modern LLM serving stacks. Vortex enables rapid prototyping, deployment, and evaluation of sparse attention algorithms, effectively translating their theoretical efficiency gains into real-world throughput improvements. As a result, Vortex substantially accelerates the design and iteration of sparse attention algorithms. First, AI agents use Vortex to automatically generate and refine diverse algorithms, the best reaching up to $3.46\times$ higher throughput than full attention while preserving accuracy. Second, Vortex extends sparse attention to emerging architectures and very large models that are otherwise hard to experiment with, reaching up to $4.7\times$ higher throughput on the MLA-based GLM-4.7-Flash and $1.37\times$ on the 229B-parameter MiniMax-M2.7 on NVIDIA B200 GPUs.
2606.06453.paper_summary_zh: 稀疏注意力對於服務大型語言模型（LLMs）變得越來越重要，因為生成長度持續增長。<lb/>然而，在大規模上部署和評估新的稀疏注意力算法仍然需要大量工程工作，這減緩了人類研究者和AI代理在探索稀疏注意力設計方面的進展。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了Vortex，一個系統，它結合了一種嵌入Python的前端語言，基於頁面中心的張量抽象來表達廣泛的稀疏注意力算法，以及一個高效的後端，與現代LLM服務堆棧緊密集成。<lb/>Vortex使得稀疏注意力算法的快速原型設計、部署和評估成為可能，有效地將其理論效率提升轉化為現實世界的吞吐量改進。<lb/>因此，Vortex大大加速了稀疏注意力算法的設計和迭代。<lb/>首先，AI代理使用Vortex自動生成和改進多樣的算法，最佳的算法達到高達$3.46\times$的吞吐量，相較於全注意力，同時保持準確性。<lb/>其次，Vortex將稀疏注意力擴展到新興架構和非常大的模型，這些模型否則難以進行實驗，在基於MLA的GLM-4.7-Flash上達到高達$4.7\times$的吞吐量，在229B參數的MiniMax-M2.7上則達到$1.37\times$，均在NVIDIA B200 GPU上運行。
2606.06453.author: Zhuoming Chen et.al.
2606.06453.authors: Zhuoming Chen, Xinrui Zhong, Qilong Feng, Ranajoy Sadhukhan, Yang Zhou, Michael Qizhe Shieh, Zhihao Jia, Beidi Chen
